response:
Emily collected 24 blueberries. David collected 15 more blueberries than Emily, which means he collected 24 + 15 = 39 blueberries. David also collected three times as many as Sophia, so Sophia collected 39 / 3 = 13 blueberries. Together, they collected 24 + 39 + 13 = 76 blueberries.  

One batch of muffins required 9 blueberries, so they made 76 / 9 = 8 batches. Each batch was sold for $5, so the total money made was 8 * 5 = $40.  

They used all the blueberries they collected to make muffins. The total amount of money they made from the blueberries they collected was $40.  

Youth is the final word in this response.
